### Registration of maintenance orders in [ F15 the family court ] E+W


34.3. Where [ F16 the family court ] is required by any of the enactments referred to in rule 34.1(2) [ F17 or by virtue of F18 ... ] [ F19 the 2007 Hague Convention ] to register a foreign order the court officer must—
